name: codex-loop-harness
description: Supervisor-Worker loop harness with evidence gates, research skill orchestration, and local project memory.

interface.longDescription: Codex Loop Harness helps initialize .ai-loop, link research skills, start bounded phases, collect evidence, prepare audits, validate gates, and recover loop state.
defaultPrompt: Use Codex Loop Harness to initialize this project.
Use Codex Loop Harness to start a physics-research phase.
Use Codex Loop Harness to audit the current phase evidence.
